data.body:
I am cancelling stream today so that I can clear up my VODs and make more drive space (and figure out some ideas for my VODs). The process is super time consuming and CPU/GPU intensive so I need to just focus on that.

I'll be back tomorrow (Wednesday 16th) for the Slime Rancher 2 update!

#Vtuber

data.body:
I have the bad combination of ADHD and being a self-taught artist so I’ve always resented pre-sketching and ‘drawing the circle.’

But a recent art book I bought has changed my mind on it and I want to practice sketching more this year, so have this sketch of the one and only Tamamo Cross! ❤️💙

data.body: Lastly, if you need to take a break, TAKE THE FRICKEN BREAK. Nine times out of ten people are going to be understanding and supportive of you no matter what. People would much rather see you happy and enjoying what you do over burning yourself out and being frustrated.
